definition: Unique audit row identifier; not a source identifier.
Audited data family/subfamily; no implicit conversion between families.
Measured or reported observable exactly classified.
Species or unresolved aggregate to which the observation pertains.
Model parameter family potentially informed; not a fitted result.
One or more of direct measurement, aggregate measurement, balance-inferred, calibration-derived, model-derived, fitted.
found; found but unusable; or not found.
yes only when exact source file, locator, basis, method, and hash are complete.
yes only after all qualification gates pass.
Reason row is qualified, quarantined, or rejected.
Source row or audit grouping label.
Primary DOI URL or repository URL; mirrored retrieval URLs are in source table.
SHA-256 of exact source file. Blank here because bytes were unavailable.
Local path to exact source file, if available.
Temperature exactly as printed; no °C/K conversion.
Total pressure as printed; may be text 'atmospheric' when no numeric value was stated.
CO2 partial pressure as printed; blank if not reported.
direct, calibration-derived, model-derived, or not reported.
Printed liquid mole fraction; never rebased.
Printed vapor mole fraction; never rebased.
Unloaded MEA mass fraction or explicitly nominal campaign label.
Usually mass fraction; label states if nominal.
Primary loading value exactly as printed.
Exact loading definition or explicit 'source-defined; pending definition'.
Second determination at same equilibrium state, retained without duplication.
Scalar measured property when not represented by a dedicated field.
Lower frequency of a dielectric spectrum.
Upper frequency of a dielectric spectrum.
Static/zero-frequency relative permittivity if legitimately available.
Verbatim/precise definition of all composition fields; no silent conversion.
Machine-readable source columns and unresolved aggregates.
Standard state, when relevant and declared.
Differential, integral, semi-differential, excess, apparent, etc.
All recovered uncertainty/calibration details without invented propagation.
Which possible degradation/byproduct species were assayed.
Primary-PDF, mirror, OCR, figure, or secondary-encoding status.
Rows sharing apparatus, batch, calibration, or fit.
Compact unconverted rendering of the source row.
